videos.headline: Avery Sledge returns the blocked punt for a Mississippi St. TD
videos.description: John Lewis blocks the punt and Avery Sledge returns it to give the Bulldogs a 34-7 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Avery Sledge returns the blocked punt for a Mississippi St. TD) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Creed Whittemore breaks free for a 53-yard Mississippi St. TD
videos.description: Creed Whittemore turns on the burners and outruns the Lions' defense for a 53-yard Bulldog TD.
